module_description: Monitors hard disk temperatures via the hddtemp daemon. Alerts when any disk on a monitored host exceeds the configured temperature threshold.

hints.label: Display name shown in the UI. Falls back to the item key if empty.
hints.threads: Number of hosts to query in parallel.
hints.alert: Maximum temperature (°C) before triggering an alert. Applied to all disks on hosts that do not have a per-disk threshold.
hints.timeout: TCP connection timeout in seconds for each hddtemp daemon.
hints.host: IP address or hostname of the hddtemp daemon.
hints.port: TCP port the hddtemp daemon is listening on (default 7634).
hints.exclude: List of device paths to ignore, e.g. ["/dev/sdc"]. Useful to skip unreliable or unmonitored drives.
hints.enabled: Enable or disable monitoring for this host.

rename_item_prompt: Enter new host name or identifier:
